---
title: "René Gempp"
subtitle: "Associate Professor · Universidad Diego Portales"
image: files/profiles/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:rene.gempp@udp.cl
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rgempp
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iWvXzDYAAAAJ
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0427-6894
---

I am the Director of the Department of Management at the [Facultad de Administración y Economía (FAE)](https://fae.udp.cl/), [Universidad Diego Portales](https://www.udp.cl/), Santiago, Chile.

My research sits at the intersection of **psychometrics**, **organizational behavior**, and **quantitative methodology**. I work with Item Response Theory (IRT), structural equation modeling (SEM), meta-analysis, and advanced scaling methods such as Best-Worst Scaling.

Current research interests include the measurement of dark personality traits (Dark Triad/HEXACO), interpersonal affect regulation in leadership contexts, and Chilean workers' labor preferences.

I teach **Organizational Behavior** at the undergraduate level and **Organizational Diagnosis** in the Master's in People Management program at UDP.

I received my training at [Universidad de La Frontera (UFRO)](https://www.ufro.cl/), where I developed a deep commitment to psychometric rigor and research ethics.
